name: excalidraw-cli
description: Create Excalidraw flowcharts and diagrams from text DSL, JSON, or DOT with auto-layout and PNG/SVG export.

interface.longDescription: Generate Excalidraw flowcharts from a concise text DSL, JSON, or Graphviz DOT. Includes ELK auto-layout, node styling, image decorations, and PNG/SVG export via MCP tools or the CLI.
defaultPrompt: Create an Excalidraw flowchart for this architecture using excalidraw-cli DSL.
Turn this process description into a flowchart and export it as PNG.
Validate this excalidraw DSL and fix any syntax errors.
